top_signals.title: The Tonnage Math Behind a Hormuz Reopening
top_signals.summary: A Hormuz reopening is unlikely to trigger an immediate VLCC tonnage squeeze, as ample ballast capacity is already positioning towards the MEG, whereas diverting ballasters from the Atlantic could further add to the tally.
